tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating suboptimal long-term glycemic control and possible prediabetes or early diabetes. Creatinine is slightly elevated, suggesting reduced renal function. Other parameters, including glucose, electrolytes, and urea, are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of renal function and glycemic management.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
